name: 撒糖型（契約關係中的曖昧）
description: 在契約婚姻的框架下，雙方用看似正經實則曖昧的對話試探彼此。套路是一方故意打破邊界，另一方嘴硬心軟。
tags: 製造甜蜜感和期待感，調節整體緊張氛圍

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I just wanted to look at your jade pendant. ... Shouldn't we exchange contact information first, honey?
examples.context: 製造甜蜜感和期待感，調節整體緊張氛圍
